title: anagallis tenella
intro: Anagallis tenella, also known as the small blue forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species within the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Anagallis tenella include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic agent to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
